title: eulophia rutenbergiana
intro: Eulophia rutenbergiana, also known as the Rutenberg's orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Eulophia rutenbergiana is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
